name: gitrails
description: Self-aware, learning engineering teammate — gitagent standard v0.1.0

scripts.review:
dotenv -e .env -- gitclaw --dir . --prompt "Review this PR for security vulnerabilities and code quality. Run sentinel, reviewer, scribe, and mirror." 2>&1 | perl -ne 'print unless /^(▶ |⚡|Task (started|completed|updated)|Compliance warn|gitrails v[0-9]|Model:|Tools:|Skills:|Agents:|Type /skills)/' | perl -0pe 's/
{3,}/

/g'
scripts.demo:blocked:
dotenv -e .env -- gitclaw --dir . --prompt "Scan ONLY scenarios/blocked/ — run: git diff origin/main...HEAD -- scenarios/blocked/ to get the diff. Run the full pipeline: sentinel, reviewer, scribe, mirror. Ignore all other changed files." 2>&1 | perl -ne 'print unless /^(▶ |⚡|Task (started|completed|updated)|Compliance warn|gitrails v[0-9]|Model:|Tools:|Skills:|Agents:|Type /skills)/' | perl -0pe 's/
{3,}/

/g'
scripts.demo:needs-review:
dotenv -e .env -- gitclaw --dir . --prompt "Scan ONLY scenarios/needs-review/ — run: git diff origin/main...HEAD -- scenarios/needs-review/ to get the diff. Run the full pipeline: sentinel, reviewer, scribe, mirror. Ignore all other changed files." 2>&1 | perl -ne 'print unless /^(▶ |⚡|Task (started|completed|updated)|Compliance warn|gitrails v[0-9]|Model:|Tools:|Skills:|Agents:|Type /skills)/' | perl -0pe 's/
{3,}/

/g'
scripts.demo:clean:
dotenv -e .env -- gitclaw --dir . --prompt "Scan ONLY scenarios/clean/ — run: git diff origin/main...HEAD -- scenarios/clean/ to get the diff. Run the full pipeline: sentinel, reviewer, scribe, mirror. Ignore all other changed files." 2>&1 | perl -ne 'print unless /^(▶ |⚡|Task (started|completed|updated)|Compliance warn|gitrails v[0-9]|Model:|Tools:|Skills:|Agents:|Type /skills)/' | perl -0pe 's/
{3,}/

/g'
